calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Aug-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ann Rankin (510-653-8886 ext 101) for Petitioner 1034 Filbert Street HOA via CourtCall.
Scott A. Freedman (415-956-8100) for Real Party in Interest Steven Clark via CourtCall.
Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, (925)384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com via CourtCall, Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: changes to CC&Rs, lowering percentage, voter apathy, good faith negotiations and agreements (as fully noted in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the papers and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition is granted as to the remaining outstanding issues as outlined in the supplemental briefing submitted by both sides. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, (925)384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com via CourtCall, Court reporter. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Aug-21-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Hearing on a Petition is continued to August 21, 2020 on Court's own motion. Parties to submit supplemental briefs (not to exceed 3 pages) addressing remaining issues, if any, by July 30, 2020. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-30-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Hearing On Petition is continued to June 30, 2020. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Continued To Mar-25-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ann Rankin, Esq., 510-653-8886, appearing for Plaintiff.

Scott Freedman, Esq., 415-956-8100, appearing for Defendant

Court reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052. Telephone: (925) 360-6065.

Argued (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court addressed the issue of the lenders not getting notice. Ms. Rankin stated that the lenders must provide in writting a request for notification and that no requests were recieved. The Court and counsel discussed the "neflifence" provision and capital improvement issues. The Court stated that this matter should be continued for counsel to provide notice to the lenders.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Notice of Hearing On Petition is continued to March 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 501. Parties waive notice. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION Notice Of Hearing On Petition is continued to December 5, 2019 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings by November 15, 2019 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date.
